import asyncio, sys, logging
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
logging.basicConfig\(level=logging.INFO, format='%\(asctime\)s %\(levelname\)s %\(message\)s'\)
logger = logging.getLogger\(\)

import httpx
from scraper.products import scrape_category_products, extract_datalayer_products

async def test\(\):

        headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_15_7\)'},
        timeout=30,
    \) as client:
        # Test with Padel Balls category \(small\)
        products = await scrape_category_products\(
            client,
            'https://www.tiendapadelpoint.com/en/padel-balls/pelotas-de-padel-en'
        \)
        for p in products[:5]:
            print\(f\\"  {p['name']}: price={p['price']} base={p['base_price']} stock={p['stock']} brand={p['manufacturer']}\\"\)
        print\(f'Total: {len\(products\)} products'\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "
import httpx, asyncio, re

async def test\(\):
    async with httpx.AsyncClient\(
        headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_15_7\)'},
        timeout=30,
    \) as client:
        resp = await client.get\('https://www.tiendapadelpoint.com/en/padel-balls/pelotas-de-padel-en', follow_redirects=True\)
        html = resp.text
        
        # Search for datalayer patterns
        patterns = [
            r'datalayerDataGMT\\s*=\\s*',
            r'datalayer',
            r'\\"products\\"',
            r'\\"product_id\\"',
            r'dataLayer\\.push',
        ]
        for p in patterns:
            matches = re.findall\(p, html\)
            print\(f'Pattern \\"{p}\\": {len\(matches\)} matches'\)
        
        # Show context around datalayerDataGMT
        idx = html.find\('datalayerDataGMT'\)
        if idx >= 0:
            print\('\\\\nContext around datalayerDataGMT:'\)
            print\(html[idx:idx+500]\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "
import asyncio, sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from db.database import init_db, AsyncSessionLocal
from scraper.products import scrape_category_products, save_products

async def test\(\):
    await init_db\(\)
    import httpx
    async with httpx.AsyncClient\(
        headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 \(Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_15_7\)'},
        timeout=30,
    \) as client:
        products = await scrape_category_products\(
            client,
            'https://www.tiendapadelpoint.com/en/padel-balls/pelotas-de-padel-en'
        \)
    # Save to DB under category_id 5 \(Padel Balls > Padel Balls\)
    from sqlalchemy import select
    from db.models import Category
    async with AsyncSessionLocal\(\) as session:
        res = await session.execute\(select\(Category\).where\(Category.name == 'Padel Balls'\).where\(Category.level == 1\)\)
        cat = res.scalar_one_or_none\(\)
        cat_id = cat.id if cat else 1
    await save_products\(products, cat_id\)
    print\(f'Saved {len\(products\)} products to DB'\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
